description: Composition Royal blue round neck jersey made of 100% polyester, with ClimaCool technology, Chelsea football Club badge appliqué d on the chest, adidas brand logo on the chest and sleeves and patented adidas 3-Stripes running down the short sleeves Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in lukewarm water below 40 degrees, using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Warm iron Do not dry clean Do not iron directly on print/trims/ logo Winning three league championships, three FA Cups and two league cups, the Blues are one of the shining stars of the new century. Flaunt your pride in the Chelsea club with this adidas jersey. It features tonal horizontal stripes accented by the 3-Stripes to create a bold new Chelsea look, adding to your style quotient. Model statistics The model wears size M Height: 6' Shoulder: 18"
